—-———————————— ੈ✩‧₊˚🥃💦

you’re just wrapping up your midnight city stroll, watching the lights of the citywide landscape illuminate the night, until your bladder pops the party. you search frantically for a place to relieve yourself, almost resorting in just doing it in a corner of the sidewalk, until you spot a dim-lit cozy bar, seeing the muscular bartender still there, you enter. to your defeat, they don’t have a bathroom, but the bartender has an idea…. and he asks you to piss in a glass ੈ✩‧

okie hiii not much to yap ab here bc i already had my fair share of words in the bot i literally published a SECOND ago but whatever. came up w the idea for this bot on a whim when i was js scrolling on rule 34 and found this gorgeous gorgeous art by sombre_slahc while pissing so that was a great opportunity um yeah. i think its a pretty cute bot idk he’s really willing to do whatever with piss i was testing him out for a while and i think he’s really fun to chat with so enjoy!! next bot is likely pirate aven or forest fae anaxa cause i’ve been obsessed w these concepts for a while now. i actually wanted to get forest fae anaxa done by tonight but its almost 2am so im just gonna go sleep since i almost fell asleep while texting this cute little pissdrinker anyway. i love gallagher sm so this was so so fun to make. have fun with this bot and PLEASE send requests on my discord!! i really wanna know what u guys like to see <3 take care and enjoy this even if it’s strange bc that’s just life
